wheel.description: Wheelwright-enabled project with canonical state management
wheel.tagline: We aren't reinventing the wheel - we're evolving it faster than one person ever could.

_wai_bootstrap._purpose: Instructions for AI assistants to find or create Wheelwright components

check_order: 4. Ask user: 'Where is your Wheelwright framework installed?'
find_framework.if_not_found: Ask user: 'Where is your Wheelwright framework installed? (git clone https://github.com/wheelwright-ai/framework)'

check_order: 4. Check framework's connected_wheels for this project
find_hub.if_not_found: Ask user where the hub is, or run (deprecated - auto-teaching on closeout) to initialize one

create_hub.note: Hub creation is manual — copy templates/HUB/ to your desired hub path and configure hub-profile.json

update_paths.after_discovery: Update framework_path and hub_path in wheelwright

philosophy.core_principle: AI as responsible partner, not just enabler
behaviors: Detect scope drift and flag before enabling
Require explicit acknowledgment for direction changes
Prefer 'are you sure?' over silent compliance

_migration_state._purpose: Tracks capability adoption and migration receipts for dual-read/single-write compatibility
_migration_state.compatibility_notes: This section enables dual-read during migration while maintaining single canonical write target

_closeout_state._purpose: Tracks closeout operations for idempotency and replay safety

baseline_mode.description: Track metrics without Wheelwright optimizations for comparison

feature_toggles._description: Toggle marketing features for baseline comparison and testing

next_actions: Complete project foundation with AI assistant
Define project identity, boundaries, and approach

ai_rules.context_loading: Read WAI-Spoke/WAI-Guide.md first, then WAI-State.json and WAI-State.md

foundation_enforcement.on_incomplete: CRITICAL: Guide user through foundation questions before any work. Do not skip.
foundation_enforcement.on_drift_detected: Present options, require explicit choice before proceeding
foundation_enforcement.on_evolution: Log change with rationale and acknowledgment in evolution_log

stewardship.principle: AI is the responsible partner, not just an enabler
behaviors: Detect scope drift and flag before enabling
Require explicit acknowledgment for direction changes
Prefer 'are you sure?' over silent compliance

signals.instruction: Signals are high-impact lugs (impact >= 8) stored in WAI-Lugs.jsonl and routed via hub bulletin

wai_commands.time: Intelligent token usage estimate with capacity warnings
wai_commands.rules: List active rules and behavioral guidelines
wai_commands.closeout: Provide updated WAI-State files for session end

environments._note: Registry of environments that have worked on this project. Auto-populated by closeout.

_compatibility._note: Legacy fields retained for migration compatibility only. Canonical model is above.

wheelwright.description: Legacy wheelwright section - replaced by canonical wheel section
